## Checklist

- [ ] Ran `./scripts/dev.sh test` — all tests pass.
- [ ] Ran `./scripts/dev.sh lint` — clean.
- [ ] Updated `docs/SESSION_HANDOVER.md` if this is the end of a working session.
- [ ] Wrote/updated an ADR if I made a non-trivial decision.
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` / `docs/RUNBOOK.md` if behavior changed.
- [ ] No secrets in the diff.
